purpose: Obsolete-test enumeration gating for M4 atomic deletion. Validator mandate m1_test_enumeration_required: enumerate ALL currently-passing tests that will become obsolete post-M4 across BOTH crates/tldr-core/src/security/taint_tests.rs and crates/tldr-core/tests/security_tests.rs.
verification_method: grep -n 'fn test_*' on both files; cross-checked against premortem A2 baseline list (~24 tests). Each line number verified at HEAD e772913 + the M1 3-LOC AST_ONLY_TEST_MODE extension.
decision_rules: Tests asserting on regex bank content via is_sanitizer / detect_sanitizer / find_sanitizers_in_statement against a hardcoded string are DELETE post-M4 (regex bank empty → assertions break deterministically). Tests at compute_taint level that go through the full pipeline are KEEP — AST sanitizer dispatch covers them post-M4.

tests.name: test_int_sanitizes_sql_injection
tests.reason: Calls is_sanitizer + find_sanitizers_in_statement on 'safe_id = int(user_id)'; asserts is_sanitizer true + sanitizers.len() == 1 + Numeric type. All three assertions break post-M4 because is_sanitizer returns false on empty Vec.

tests.name: test_shlex_quote_sanitizes_command_injection
tests.reason: Same shape as L322; asserts SanitizerType::Shell. Breaks post-M4.

tests.name: test_html_escape_sanitizes_xss
tests.reason: Same shape as L322; asserts SanitizerType::Html. Breaks post-M4.

tests.name: test_typescript_detect_sanitizers
tests.reason: Calls detect_sanitizer('parseInt(val)', TypeScript) and asserts Some(SanitizerType::Numeric). Post-M4 regex Vec is empty, returns None — assertion fails deterministically.

tests.name: test_javascript_detect_sanitizers
tests.reason: Direct detect_sanitizer assertion on regex bank. Same pattern as TypeScript.

tests.name: test_go_detect_sanitizers
tests.reason: Direct detect_sanitizer assertion on regex bank: 'strconv.Atoi(val)' → Numeric.

tests.name: test_java_detect_sanitizers
tests.reason: Direct detect_sanitizer assertion on regex bank.

tests.name: test_rust_detect_sanitizers
tests.reason: Direct detect_sanitizer assertion on regex bank.

tests.name: test_c_detect_sanitizers
tests.reason: Direct detect_sanitizer assertion on regex bank.

tests.name: test_cpp_detect_sanitizers
tests.reason: Direct detect_sanitizer assertion on regex bank.

tests.name: test_ruby_detect_sanitizers
tests.reason: Direct detect_sanitizer assertion on regex bank. Was preserved in field_access_info-extension-v1 M5; deleted now since sanitizer regex banks become empty.

tests.name: test_kotlin_detect_sanitizers
tests.reason: Direct detect_sanitizer assertion on regex bank.

tests.name: test_swift_detect_sanitizers
tests.reason: Direct detect_sanitizer assertion on regex bank.

tests.name: test_csharp_detect_sanitizers
tests.reason: Direct detect_sanitizer assertion on regex bank.

tests.name: test_scala_detect_sanitizers
tests.reason: Direct detect_sanitizer assertion on regex bank.

tests.name: test_php_detect_sanitizers
tests.reason: Direct detect_sanitizer assertion on regex bank including (int) cast literal — PHP raw-substring fallback at PHP_AST_SANITIZERS handles cast post-M4.

tests.name: test_lua_detect_sanitizers
tests.reason: Direct detect_sanitizer assertion on regex bank.

tests.name: test_luau_detect_sanitizers
tests.reason: Direct detect_sanitizer assertion on regex bank (Luau shares LUA_PATTERNS).

tests.name: test_elixir_detect_sanitizers
tests.reason: Direct detect_sanitizer assertion on regex bank. Was preserved in field_access_info-extension-v1 M5; deleted now.

tests.name: test_ocaml_detect_sanitizers
tests.reason: Direct detect_sanitizer assertion on regex bank. Was preserved in field_access_info-extension-v1 M5; deleted now.

tests.name: test_detect_sanitizer_python_int
tests.reason: Calls detect_sanitizer on 'safe_id = int(user_id)', asserts Some(SanitizerType::Numeric). Breaks post-M4 because regex bank empty.

tests.name: test_detect_sanitizer_python_shlex
tests.reason: Calls detect_sanitizer, asserts Some(SanitizerType::Shell). Breaks post-M4.

tests.name: test_detect_sanitizer_python_html_escape
tests.reason: Calls detect_sanitizer, asserts Some(SanitizerType::Html). Breaks post-M4.

tests.name: test_detect_sanitizer_typescript
tests.reason: Calls detect_sanitizer on 'parseInt(val)', asserts Some(SanitizerType::Numeric). Breaks post-M4.

preserved.name: test_sanitizer_removes_taint
preserved.reason: Operates at compute_taint level (uses fixtures::linear_cfg + statements). AST sanitizer dispatch covers the same fixture post-M4 because compute_taint internally parses + delegates to compute_taint_with_tree.

preserved.name: test_no_vulnerability_when_sanitized
preserved.reason: Operates at compute_taint level; AST sanitizer dispatch covers it post-M4.

preserved.name: test_compute_taint_sanitizer_removes_taint
preserved.reason: Uses compute_taint which internally parses + delegates to compute_taint_with_tree; AST sanitizer dispatch covers 'safe_id = int(user_id)' via Python AST call_names: ['int'] post-M4.

preserved.name: test_sanitizer_type_serialization
preserved.reason: Serializes the SanitizerType enum, not the regex bank. Unaffected by M4.

augmentation_notes: Premortem A2 baseline list of 24 tests verified exhaustively at HEAD. Zero augmentations required. The 17 test_<lang>_detect_sanitizers + 3 Python-named-shape + 4 detect_sanitizer-direct tests are all present at the documented line numbers and all use the regex bank as an oracle.
gating_for: M4 atomic deletion — without this enumeration, cargo test --workspace fails deterministically at the M4 verification gate.
